name: @hasna/knowledge
description: Agent-friendly local knowledge CLI with JSON output, pagination, and safe destructive actions

scripts.build: bun build --target=bun --outfile=bin/open-knowledge.js --minify --external @aws-sdk/client-s3 --external @aws-sdk/credential-providers --external ai --external @ai-sdk/openai --external @ai-sdk/anthropic --external @ai-sdk/deepseek src/cli.ts && bun build --target=bun --outfile=bin/open-knowledge-mcp.js --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external @aws-sdk/client-s3 --external @aws-sdk/credential-providers --external ai --external @ai-sdk/openai --external @ai-sdk/anthropic --external @ai-sdk/deepseek src/mcp.js

author: Hasna Inc. <hasna@example.com>
